novelty: Session 7 compilation: 9 new discoveries, therapeutic paradoxes, entropy analysis

GR 91pp Within-Target Variance.finding: Glucocorticoid receptor: 14 drugs spanning 91.2pp (Mifepristone to Methylprednisolone)

AE Concordance 62.7%.finding: Mean AE pair concordance 62.7% — AEs in same drugs tend to share sex-bias direction

Bone Density 100%F Across 27 Drugs.finding: Bone density decreased is 100% female-biased across ALL 27 drugs with this signal

Selectivity NS.finding: Target count doesn't predict sex-bias (Kruskal-Wallis p=0.21)

PPI Bridge Gap.finding: Gene→Protein ID bridge failed — need unified identifier mapping

Non-Normal Effect Sizes.finding: Effect sizes non-normal (Shapiro p=1.6e-35), female |LR| > male (p=2.8e-41)

KG Structure Low Predictability.finding: Random Forest R²=0.05 — graph topology poorly predicts sex-bias

63.8% Therapeutic Paradoxes.finding: 37/58 drug-disease pairs show paradoxical sex-bias (disease F, AEs M or vice versa)
